design_read: Live review operations workbench for content/ecommerce operators, with restrained DataHub enterprise-console language, optimized for closing livestream evidence gaps.

state_checks.authenticated_route: Verified: final URL stayed on /content/live-center with h1 present and no login redirect.
state_checks.selected_session: Verified: one selected table row was present after the change.
state_checks.focus_visible: Verified on desktop: selected row retained a 2px brand-blue outline when focused.
state_checks.horizontal_overflow: Verified: no page-level horizontal overflow on desktop or mobile after the change; table uses contained horizontal scrolling.
state_checks.responsive_priority: Verified: mobile workbench moved into the first viewport at y=777 in a 390x844 viewport.

required_findings: Mobile task priority improved: workbench starts at y=777 and is visible in the first 844px viewport.
Desktop remains a two-column operational workbench with no page-level horizontal overflow.
Readiness and next action now precede the metric grid in the selected-session detail panel.
Header and command-strip density was reduced without introducing a marketing or decorative treatment.
Selected-state blue is reserved for the selected row while converted-row emphasis is neutralized.
false_positive_guards: Do not score this above 92 because upload, empty, error, active analysis, and full keyboard traversal were not exhaustively revalidated.
Do not claim the contained table horizontal scroll was removed; it remains intentionally inside the table viewport.
Do not treat the design as a new visual language; this is an enforce-mode polish under DataHub DESIGN.md.
